The '''B-12 bacta transport''' was manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] specifically to transport [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]].

==Description==
[[File:Bacta_Transport_Deckplan.jpg|thumb|left|150px|B-12 Bacta Transport forward Deck Plan]]
The B-12 was a 238-meter long starship dedicated to [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] transport. Its hulls was a spinoff of the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] also produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The ship carried 26 crew, 6 passengers, and 600,000 metric tons of bacta in sixteen pressurized spheres<ref name="LE" /> with controlled temperature to keep the bacta from spoiling.

==History==
The B-12 bacta transport was commissioned by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] to transport safely bacta. It soon became one of the most popular bacta transport class.<ref name="LE" />

Sometime before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a B-12 transport, the ''[[Suveron]]'', was destroyed in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], releasing half million tons of bacta in space. Although it was not suitable for medicinal use anymore, the bacta survived the vacuum of space and generated a large pocket of space gas later known as the [[Linear Miasma]].<ref name="SWG:TGTLM">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|The Grand Tour - Linear Miasma|Endor system}}</ref>
